title: evolvulus glomeratus subsp. obtusus
intro: Evolvulus glomeratus subsp. obtusus, also known as dwarf blue daze, is a species of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family. This plant is native to the Americas and has been used for its medicinal and health benefits for centuries. The leaves and flowers of Evolvulus glomeratus subsp. obtusus contain flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which have been reported to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues such as fever, digestive problems, and skin conditions. Evolvulus glomeratus subsp. obtusus is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can be used to make herbal remedies, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
